title: Identity Abuse Hunt
description: Opinionated identity-abuse hunt pack that composes valid-account, brute-force, and account-manipulation playbooks.
hypothesis_templates: Multiple identity-control signals combine into a coherent account-takeover or persistence story for the same user or identity set.

telemetry_requirements.description: Identity and admin audit logs showing password resets, MFA changes, group membership edits, and application consent.

blind_spots: Helpdesk-assisted account recovery performed outside centralized identity telemetry can obscure the earliest takeover steps.
notes: This pack is intended as the default starting point for suspicious login, password reset, MFA bypass, or session hijack leads.
